response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:52: Introduction talk between Fubuki and Waku-san. 2. 02:52: Song 'Boku no Hikouki' starts, identifying the title from on-screen text '僕の飛行機'. 3. Searched for '僕の飛行機' and 'フレア' (the latter was mentioned during conversation) but confirmed 'Boku no Hikouki' is the song performed. 4. Retrieved lyrics directly from the on-screen display in the video.
response.global_summary: The video features the VTuber Shirakami Fubuki performing her original song 'Boku no Hikouki' (My Paper Plane) at a live event. The performance begins after a brief conversational introduction with another character, 'Waku-san'.

scenes.description: Shirakami Fubuki chats with 'Waku-san' about an upcoming BEMANI collaboration and performing a new song.
Shirakami Fubuki performs her original song 'Boku no Hikouki'. The lyrics are displayed on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
[Verse 1]
どこまで飛べるかを
確かめに僕ら旅に出る
夢は尽きることを忘れて
草原を駆け抜けて行ったけど

[Verse 2]
幼い憧れと
ほどけた指切り 絆にする
逃げ出せないから
ただ空を見てた

[Verse 3]
かっこ悪いから
嘘をついた
白いノート1枚破って
今日の日付とさよなら

[Chorus]
託した紙飛行機
風に乗って舞い上がって
蒼く溶けた
旅立ちの歌を背に
白い軌道追いかけて

[Outro]
ここで見てた淡い夢も
翼にして
いつか誰かに届いてくれる?
僕の飛行機
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
[Verse 1]
Where can we fly to?
We're setting off on a trip to find out
Forgetting the dreams that run out
We ran through the meadows

[Verse 2]
With childish longing and
With unraveled fingers we make bonds
Because we can't escape
We just looked at the sky

[Verse 3]
Because it's bad
I told a lie
I tore up one sheet of white notebook paper
Today's date and goodbye

[Chorus]
Entrusted paper plane
Ride the wind and soar
Melting into the blue
With the song of departure on our backs
Chasing the white trail

[Outro]
The faint dream we watched here too
Make it into wings
And someday, will it reach someone?
My paper plane
